defaultPaths.description: The initial SVG paths of the signature pad when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the signature pad is disabled.

draw.description: Emits while the user is drawing.

drawEnd.description: Emits when drawing completes or the pad is cleared.

id.description: The unique identifier of the signature pad.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; control: string; hiddenInput: string; label: string }>
ids.description: The ids of the signature pad elements. Useful for composition.

name.description: The name of the hidden input used for form submission.

paths.description: The controlled SVG paths of the signature pad.

readOnly.description: Whether the signature pad is read-only.

required.description: Whether the signature pad is required.

translations.description: The localized strings for the signature pad.

value.description: The signature pad machine returned by useSignaturePad().
The serialized value submitted with the form.
